headline: Smurfit Westrock (SW) Could Be 17% Undervalued On Earnings Reset Bets
summary: Smurfit Westrock (SW) heads into its July 29 earnings report with investors watching how a projected year-over-year earnings decline, despite higher revenue, and recent downward EPS revisions might influence the stock. See our latest analysis for Smurfit Westrock. Over the past year, momentum in Smurfit Westrock has been mixed, with a 12.4% year to date share price return but a decline of 2.87% in 1 year total shareholder return. The recent 9.85% 90 day share price return suggests interest...

headline: How Investors May Respond To Smurfit Westrock (SW) Lowered EPS Forecasts Despite Rising Revenue
summary: Smurfit Westrock recently faced lowered analyst earnings estimates for the June 2026 quarter, with consensus pointing to a year-over-year earnings decline despite higher revenues and an earnings report that has already passed. The company’s clean sweep of missing consensus EPS estimates across the last four quarters has become a central concern, intensifying uncertainty around how reliably it can convert revenue into profit. We’ll now examine how these reduced earnings expectations and the...
